## ⚠️ Do NOT paste secrets

Don't paste `.env` contents, connection strings, OpenAI / R2 / Neon credentials, or signed cookie values. Only variable NAMES that are unset/misconfigured. If a stack trace contains a URL with a query string, redact the query.
